mapper.select: SELECT staffs.*, d.Dname as departmentName, j.Jname as jobTitle FROM staffs staffs LEFT JOIN departments d ON staffs.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN jobs j ON staffs.job_id = j.id 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment}
SELECT u.*, d.Dname as departmentName, j.Jname as jobTitle FROM staffs u LEFT JOIN departments d ON u.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN jobs j ON u.job_id = j.id WHERE u.id = #{userId}

SELECT s.Sid as sid, s.Sname as sname, s.gender as gender, s.role as role, s.hire_date as hireDate, s.phone as phone, s.email as email, s.dept_id as deptId, s.job_id as jobId, d.Dname as deptName, j.Jname as jobName FROM staffs s LEFT JOIN departments d ON s.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN jobs j ON s.job_id = j.id WHERE s.id = #{userId}
